case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. BILLIE JEAN MARTIN et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ORIGINAL SUMMONS RETURNED. ( MATURITY DATE 11/12/03 ) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED NOV-03-2003, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MARTIN, BILLIE JEAN
DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT RE ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT MARTIN, BILLIE JEAN DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT MARTIN, BILLIE JEAN

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTIN, BILLIE JEAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 4 SANTOS ST. S.F. CA., LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
